meaning: n.[医]局限性肺炎 肺炎
examples: We analyzed the morbidity of radiation pneumonitis in different primary diseases.
Objective To identify high resolution CT features of subacute or chronic hypersensitivity pneumonitis , and to improve HRCT diagnostic accuracy.
Symptoms of some diseases, including asthma, hypersensitivity, pneumonitis, and fever, may also show up soon after exposure to some indoor air pollutants.
